acceptance_criteria: Module installs locally with `Import-Module` on Windows, macOS, Linux.
Unit tests cover all public functions.
Pester tests pass on at least two platforms before public publish.
`Test-SlashOpsPreflight` accurately reports Ollama / model / tool status.
`/` can generate a command and ask before execution.
`/x` auto-executes bounded benign-write command when policy permits.
Safety scan blocks remote script execution.
FxConsole renders setup / preflight / plan / risk / result output.
README includes clear safety warnings and examples.
description: Checklist gate that closes the v0.1 milestone. No code; verify all 16 acceptance criteria from PRD §15.1 against the implementation.
notes: This task gates `pub-02..04` for the actual publish.
steps: Walk every criterion against the running tree.
File defects against specific tasks for any criterion that fails.
When all criteria pass, write `docs/RELEASE_NOTES_v0.1.md` summarising delivered scope.
name: [gate-v01] v0.1 acceptance gate
